- **Transaction Sender** (untrusted) - External users submitting state-changing transactions

- **Block Producer** (semi-trusted) - Validators determining transaction ordering

- **7 in-scope** - Transaction processing, P2P block/proof delivery, Engine API, state sync, storage root computation, block producer interaction
